title: Tempered representations and nilpotent orbits
journal: Representation Theory of the American Mathematical Society
abstract:
Given a nilpotent orbit 

  
    
      O
    
    \mathcal {O}
  

 of a real, reductive algebraic group, a necessary condition is given for the existence of a tempered representation 

  
    π
    \pi
  

 such that 

  
    
      O
    
    \mathcal {O}
  

 occurs in the wave front cycle of 

  
    π
    \pi
  

. The coefficients of the wave front cycle of a tempered representation are expressed in terms of volumes of precompact submanifolds of an affine space.
